Whitened plots (using the FD PSD and a default windowing) are illustrative, and do not correspond to the full TD treatment applied in the analysis.

Warning: To err on the conservative side, when fixing the start time, pyRing selects the discrete sample immediately after the start time requested. This implies that the actual start time used in the analysis can be larger than the one requested up to 0.000244 s, i.e. 1/(sampling_rate).
If you wish to reduce this error, please increase the sampling rate and the bandpassing frequency accordingly.

Starting sampling using CPNest 0.11.3 version.
The sampling output can be found in the `GW150914_PROD1_Kerr_221_0M/Nested_sampler/cpnest.log` file.
